prompt: Rank from fewest to most eggs in a single clutch

items.name: Emperor Penguin
items.fact: 1 egg — incubated on the father's feet

items.name: Bald Eagle
items.fact: 2 eggs — typically in a massive nest

items.name: Green Sea Turtle
items.fact: ~110 eggs — buried in sandy beach nests

items.name: Salmon
items.fact: ~5,000 eggs — laid in river gravel nests

items.name: Ocean Sunfish
items.fact: 300 million eggs — most of any vertebrate
